rationale: Acting on Review 1 renames the three Prop classes (AffineAlgGroup/ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup) + AlgPoints, removes the redundant wrapper lemma, and corrects the misleading field name, all of which are directly visible naming problems in the diff (inconsistent Is- prefix vs. IsUnipotent/imports, specialized vs. general functor signature, placeholder : True with overstated name); Review 2's approve leaves those unchanged, so the resulting PR after Review 1 is strictly better on the naming rubric.
